# Epic Template

- `Title:`
- `Description:` (epic summary in user/business terms)
- `Context:` (problem/opportunity, business outcome, target users/segments)
- `Acceptance Criteria:` (epic-level outcome checks)
- `Readiness Verdict: Ready | Needs Refinement`
- `Source References:`
- `Engineering Stage-Gated Details:` (optional; include only when explicitly requested or required)
  - `In Scope:`
  - `Out of Scope:`
  - `Success Metrics:`
  - `Dependencies:`
  - `Risks:`
  - `Milestones / Story Breakdown Strategy:`
- `Failed Gates:` (required when `Needs Refinement`)
- `Missing Sources:` (required when grounding is incomplete)
